rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisal reductions. Educ. Code §29.352 governs the comptroller's education savings account program. The provisions address unrelated subject matters with no operative interaction.
quote: The comptroller shall establish and administer a program to provide funding for approved education-related expenses of children participating in the program
_note: No conflict identified. The rule text concerns establishment of an education-related funding program; the proposed change modifies a property tax homestead exemption amount. No cross-reference or dependency between the two provisions is apparent.
